sections.heading: This Order may be cited as the Chiefs (Recognition)
The person named in the Schedule to this Order is hereby Recognition
sections.text:
recognised as being, within the area in Zambia described in the of Chief
Schedule, the holder of the office specified in the Schedule.
SCHEDULE
(Paragraph 2)
Office Area Holder ofO ffice
Chief Mukupa Katandula of the ltabwa Benson Chikwanda
Tabwa people of-Kaputa Njalamimba
District in the Northern Province
LEVY P. MWANAWASA, SC,

LUSAKA
10th April, 2008
